_note: All values are pre-calibration placeholders from spec §9.4. Replaced empirically after 60+ Phase 1 sessions via notebooks/. Do NOT hand-tune.

tap_separation._iter1_note: Bumped from 5min/2× to 10min/3× — 60-day replay showed strikes racking up 20+ taps/day at the old cooldown, which is frame-cadence inflation, not real deflections.

trinity_thresholds._iter1_note: Lowered from 60/30/120/60. Bias scores cap empirically around 62 (max possible ~82 given component weights), so |avg|>60 was unreachable. 45 is realistic upper-tier and 25 is realistic moderate.

rr_gating._iter2_note: Lowered from 3.0/2.0/2.0. After switching to fixed-bps TP, R:R = 25/median_stop = 25/17 ≈ 1.5. Need floor below that to admit setups. Spec §6.8 placeholder R:R thresholds were calibrated against the now-unused structural target distance.

take_profit._iter2_note: Switched from spec §6.7 structural-node target (next ≥5% rel_sig in trade direction) to fixed bps. MFE study showed structural targets at median 54.6 bps were 2× the median MFE_30m of 28.6 bps — most trades stopped before reaching target despite favorable excursion. 25 bps is the optimal point in the grid search (TP=25/spec-stop = +189 total bps over 60d).

bias_filter._iter2_note: High-bias paradox: |bias_score| in [30, 40] had 50% win rate and -9.4 bps avg across baseline accepts (Feb 3, Feb 24, Jan 21). MFE on those trades was ≤1.1 bps — they never went our direction. Filter at synthesis Step 4.
